title: Opernball
writer: Ernst Marischka, Viktor Léon, Heinrich von Waldberg
actors: Heli Finkenzeller, Fita Benkhoff, Marte Harell
plot: After Richard Heuberger's operetta of the same name, Géza von Bolváry staged a high-spirited confusion about infidelity and amusing entanglements in Vienna at the turn of the century.
